name: @limxdynatic-gradmotion/gradmotion-cli
description: Gradmotion CLI — 训练任务管理命令行工具，支持 Agent 集成

scripts.prepack: cd .. && (ls dist/gm-darwin-amd64 2>/dev/null || VERSION=v$npm_package_version ./scripts/build-all.sh) && rm -rf npm/vendor && mkdir -p npm/vendor && cp dist/gm-darwin-amd64 dist/gm-darwin-arm64 dist/gm-linux-amd64 dist/gm-linux-arm64 dist/gm-windows-amd64.exe dist/gm-windows-arm64.exe npm/vendor/

author: LimX Dynamics
